title: cyperus cruentus
intro: Cyperus cruentus, also known as the red papyrus sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus cruentus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
